promise.title:
One hand,
full
responsibility.
promise.p1: We believe in renovation without hand-offs: a single main contractor who owns every trade — from the bare shell to the last cabinet seam. You deal with one point of contact who stands behind all of it.
promise.p2: That clarity isn't a luxury. It's what lets a space still feel as calm in fifteen years as it did on the first day.

packages.title:
Four routes to a
finished space.
packages.intro: From a one-room refresh to an office fit-out or a full renovation: every package bundles planning, site management and all trades — with a clear price and a firm completion date.

haus.title:
House
renovation
haus.desc: Full renovation of existing buildings — roof, façade and interiors from a single source.

wohnung.title:
Apartment
renovation
wohnung.desc: Bathrooms, kitchens, floors, wiring: city apartments — liveable again in 6–10 weeks.

gastronomie.title:
Restaurant
fit-out
gastronomie.desc: Restaurants, bars, hotels: from concept to opening night — turnkey.

buero.title:
Office
fit-out
buero.desc: Offices, practices and workspaces — move-in ready, with services, acoustics and finishes.

stats.title: Twelve years. One line.
stats.intro: Numbers don't build spaces — but they show how seriously we take the brief. A plain, honest cut through our work since 2014.

since.label: Building since
since.desc: Founded by Daniel and Monica in Frankfurt am Main.

projects.label: Completed projects
projects.desc: From a granny flat to a 220-seat restaurant.

trades.label: Trades under one roof
trades.desc: From the shell to the joinery — all in-house or under contract.

onTime.label: On-time delivery
onTime.desc: A firm completion date in the contract — or we pay a penalty.

calculator.title:
A live estimate.
In seconds.
calculator.p: Four clicks, one range: property type, area, finish level, trades. The calculator works in real time — no sign-up, no phone call. A first sense of cost, right away.

blitz.title:
A fixed price, in writing.
Within 24 hours.
blitz.p: Something more concrete? Fill in a short form — we review it, run the numbers and send a written preliminary estimate by email, countersigned by our site management.

steps.1: Fill in the short form (3 minutes)

trades.title:
Nineteen trades,
one hand.
trades.intro: Every trade coordinated by our own site management — bookable on its own or as a complete package. Here's a selection of the disciplines clients ask for most.

heating.title: Ready for the future.
heating.p: Upgrade to modern heating with our packages — grant-eligible, quiet and free of gas.

pump.title:
Air-source
heat pump
pump.desc: Up to 70% energy savings. Retrofit in 7–10 days, eligible for funding.

risers.title:
Heating
risers
risers.desc: Vertical risers with hydraulic balancing — precise heat distribution, lower pump load.

radiators.title:
Design
radiators
radiators.desc: Architecturally integrated flat aluminium radiators — slim, quiet, low-temperature ready.

founders.title:
A construction firm
run like a
family business.
founders.p1: Daniel and Monica have led Prima Vista since 2014 — as a couple, as site managers, as your point of contact. Build with us and you talk not to a call centre, but to the people whose names are on the contract.
founders.p2: From our Frankfurt base we look after projects across Hesse; from Emmenbrücke, all of Central Switzerland. Both offices share materials, plans and standards — you get the same standard everywhere.
founders.photoAlt: Daniel and Monica — founders of Prima Vista Bauprojekte

testimonial.quote: We were dreading the renovation — and were taken by surprise: Prima Vista delivered on time, clean and so precisely that we moved in a month early.
testimonial.name: The Brauer family

finalCta.title:
Let's talk about
your building project.
finalCta.p: First consultation free. An appointment within 48 hours, on site or by video — in Frankfurt and Emmenbrücke.
